## Summary

## Type of change
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CI/DevEx
- [ ] Security

## Spec / Context
- [ ] Updated `docs/context/PROJECT_CONTEXT.md`
- [ ] Updated relevant spec in `docs/specs/`
- [ ] Added/updated ADR if architecture changed
- [ ] Added/updated dependency review if dependencies changed

## Validation
- [ ] `pnpm lint:deps`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm test:harness`
- [ ] `pnpm harness:mvp`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm audit`

## Risk
- [ ] No secrets added
- [ ] No runtime code depends on tooling/harness
- [ ] DB migrations are versioned
- [ ] Rollback or cleanup considered
